title: Romanovka stratovolcano
summary: Romanovka (Russian: Романовка) is a stratovolcano in central Kamchatka. The volcano is located at the north of Kozyrevka River in the southern Sredinny Range.
text: Romanovka (Russian: Романовка) is a stratovolcano in central Kamchatka. The volcano is located at the north of Kozyrevka River in the southern Sredinny Range.
